overview: The application follows a two-tier architecture: a React SPA frontend (todo-web) communicates with a single Go REST API backend (todo-api) over HTTP/JSON using JWT bearer tokens. The backend owns all business logic, authentication, and data persistence via an embedded SQLite database, while the frontend is served as a static bundle from nginx and handles routing, rendering, and user interaction entirely client-side.
requirements: Users can register with a valid email and a password of at least 8 characters; duplicate emails are rejected with a 409 response.
Users can log in with email and password; successful authentication returns a session token valid for 24 hours.
Failed login attempts return a generic 401 error without revealing whether the email or password was incorrect.
Passwords are stored using bcrypt hashing with a cost factor of at least 12.
Authenticated users can create tasks with a required title (max 200 chars), optional description (max 2000 chars), optional category, and optional due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Authenticated users can view, edit, and delete only their own tasks; cross-user access is prevented by server-side user_id scoping.
Task deletion requires user confirmation before the DELETE request is issued.
Authenticated users can toggle task completion status; marking complete records a completion timestamp, unmarking clears it.
Tasks can be filtered by completion status (all, complete, incomplete), category, and due date range.
Tasks are returned sorted by due date ascending with null due dates last.
Overdue tasks (due date < today and not completed) are visually distinguished in the UI with a red or orange indicator.
Authenticated users can create categories with names unique within their account; duplicate names return a 409 response.
Authenticated users can rename and delete categories; deleting a category clears its assignment from all tasks without deleting those tasks (done in a single transaction).
All write operations (create, update, delete) commit to the database within 500 milliseconds.
The frontend provides visual feedback within 200 milliseconds of any user action.
If a required field is missing on form submission the field is highlighted and an error message is displayed.
API errors are displayed as toast/snackbar notifications in the UI.
When a session expires or a 401 is received, the user is redirected to the login page with a 'Session expired' message.
All authentication-required API endpoints return 401 for missing or expired tokens.
All user inputs are sanitized server-side to prevent injection attacks.
The system supports up to 100 concurrent authenticated users and loads up to 1000 tasks per user within 1 second.
The SPA handles client-side routing with a fallback to index.html via nginx for direct URL access.
The API exposes a GET /health endpoint returning 200 with status ok; the web server also exposes a GET /health endpoint.

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /auth/register:
    post:
      summary: Register a new user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                password:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 8
      responses:
        '201':
          description: User created
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '409':
          description: Email already registered
  /auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Authenticate user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                password:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Session token
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  token:
                    type: string
                  expires_at:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        '401':
          description: Invalid credentials
  /auth/logout:
    post:
      summary: Logout and terminate session
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Session terminated
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List tasks for authenticated user
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [all, complete, incomplete]
        - name: category_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: due_from
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
        - name: due_to
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of tasks sorted by due date ascending
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
    post:
      summary: Create a new task
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Task created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get a task by ID
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
    put:
      summary: Update a task
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
  /tasks/{id}/toggle:
    patch:
      summary: Toggle task completion status
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated task
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List all categories for authenticated user
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
    post:
      summary: Create a category
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Category created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '409':
          description: Category name already exists
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
  /categories/{id}:
    put:
      summary: Rename a category
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated category
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          description: Validation error
        '409':
          description: Name already taken
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a category
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted; category_id cleared from all tasks
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized
        '404':
          description: Not found
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT
  schemas:
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
        completed:
          type: boolean
        completed_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    TaskInput:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          maxLength: 200
        description:
          type: string
          maxLength: 2000
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a RESTful backend API in Go using the standard net/http package. Listen on port 9090.

## Project Structure
- /main.go — entry point, sets up routes and starts server
- /handlers/ — HTTP handler functions grouped by domain (auth, tasks, categories)
- /middleware/ — JWT auth middleware, input sanitization middleware
- /models/ — struct definitions for User, Task, Category, Session
- /store/ — SQLite data layer using the modernc.org/sqlite driver (no CGO)
- /Dockerfile — multi-stage Go build

## Database (SQLite)
Use a single SQLite file at /data/todo.db. Create tables on startup:
- users(id TEXT PK, email TEXT UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT, created_at DATETIME)
- sessions(token TEXT PK, user_id TEXT, expires_at DATETIME)
- categories(id TEXT PK, user_id TEXT, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME, UNIQUE(user_id, name))
- tasks(id TEXT PK, user_id TEXT, title TEXT, description TEXT, category_id TEXT NULLABLE, due_date TEXT NULLABLE, completed INTEGER DEFAULT 0, completed_at DATETIME NULLABLE, created_at DATETIME, updated_at DATETIME)

All IDs are UUIDs generated with github.com/google/uuid.

## Authentication
- Passwords hashed with bcrypt (cost 12).
- On login, generate a random 32-byte hex token, store in sessions table with expires_at = now+24h.
- Return token in JSON response.
- Auth middleware reads Authorization: Bearer <token> header, looks up session, rejects if missing/expired.
- Logout: DELETE the session row.

## Endpoint Behaviors
- POST /auth/register: validate email format (regex), password >= 8 chars. Return 409 if email exists.
- POST /auth/login: always return 401 with generic message on failure (do not reveal which field is wrong).
- GET /tasks: filter by ?status=all|complete|incomplete, ?category_id=, ?due_from=YYYY-MM-DD, ?due_to=YYYY-MM-DD. Sort by due_date ASC NULLS LAST, then created_at ASC.
- POST /tasks: require non-empty title max 200 chars, description max 2000 chars.
- PATCH /tasks/{id}/toggle: flip completed boolean; if setting to true set completed_at=now, if false set completed_at=NULL.
- DELETE /categories/{id}: set category_id=NULL on all tasks with that category in the same transaction before deleting category row.
- All write operations must complete within 500ms; use context with timeout.
- Sanitize all string inputs (trim whitespace, reject if only whitespace for required fields).
- Always enforce user_id scoping on task and category queries to prevent cross-user access.
- Return appropriate HTTP status codes and JSON error bodies: {"error": "message"}.

## CORS
Allow all origins for development (set Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * and handle OPTIONS preflight).

## Health
GET /health returns 200 {"status":"ok"}.

## Dockerfile
Multi-stage: golang:1.22-alpine builder, then alpine runtime. Expose port 9090. Copy binary and set ENTRYPOINT.

components.name: todo-web
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web App (Static SPA)
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check for the web server
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a React 18 SPA with TypeScript using Vite as the build tool. Serve via an nginx Docker container on port 8080.

## Project Structure
- /src/main.tsx — React entry point
- /src/App.tsx — Router setup with React Router v6
- /src/api/ — API client (api.ts) using fetch, reads API base URL from env var VITE_API_URL
- /src/pages/ — LoginPage, RegisterPage, TaskListPage, CategoryPage
- /src/components/ — TaskCard, TaskForm, CategoryForm, FilterBar, Navbar, ConfirmDialog
- /src/hooks/ — useAuth, useTasks, useCategories
- /src/types/ — TypeScript interfaces for Task, Category, User
- /nginx.conf — nginx config
- /Dockerfile — multi-stage: node:20-alpine build, then nginx:alpine serve

## Routing
- / → redirect to /tasks if authenticated, else /login
- /login → LoginPage
- /register → RegisterPage
- /tasks → TaskListPage (protected)
- /categories → CategoryPage (protected)
Protected routes check for a valid token in localStorage; redirect to /login if absent.

## Authentication
- Store the bearer token in localStorage under key 'todo_token'.
- On app load, if token exists, include it in all API requests as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
- If any API call returns 401, clear localStorage and redirect to /login with message 'Session expired. Please log in again.'
- Login form: email + password fields. On submit call POST /auth/login, store token, redirect to /tasks.
- Register form: email + password + confirm password fields. Validate password match client-side before submitting.
- Logout button: call POST /auth/logout, clear localStorage, redirect to /login.

## Task List Page
- Fetch GET /tasks on mount with current filters applied.
- Display tasks sorted by due date (API handles sorting). Show title, description (truncated to 100 chars), category name (resolved from categories list), due date, completion status.
- Visually distinguish overdue tasks (due_date < today AND completed=false) with a red/orange badge or border.
- FilterBar: dropdown for status (All/Complete/Incomplete), dropdown for category, date range pickers for due_from/due_to. Apply filters on change.
- Clicking a task opens an inline edit form (TaskForm) pre-filled with task data.
- TaskForm fields: title (required, max 200), description (textarea, max 2000), category (dropdown from user's categories, optional), due date (date picker, optional, clearable).
- 'Add Task' button opens a blank TaskForm.
- TaskCard has a checkbox to toggle completion (PATCH /tasks/{id}/toggle).
- Delete button on TaskCard shows a ConfirmDialog ('Are you sure you want to delete this task?') before calling DELETE /tasks/{id}.
- Provide visual feedback within 200ms of user actions (e.g. spinner, disabled button state).
- Display API error messages in a toast/snackbar component.

## Category Page
- Fetch GET /categories on mount.
- Display list of categories with rename and delete buttons.
- Rename: inline text input with save/cancel.
- Delete: ConfirmDialog before DELETE /categories/{id}.
- Add category: input + submit button at top. Validate non-empty name. Show 409 conflict as form error.

## Styling
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling.
- Responsive layout (works on mobile and desktop).
- Navbar shows app logo ('TodoApp'), navigation links (Tasks, Categories), and logout button when authenticated.

## Environment
- VITE_API_URL defaults to http://localhost:9090 in .env.development.
- nginx.conf must proxy /health to return 200, and serve index.html for all routes (SPA fallback).

## Dockerfile
- Stage 1: node:20-alpine, install deps, build (npm run build).
- Stage 2: nginx:alpine, copy dist/ to /usr/share/nginx/html, copy nginx.conf.
- Expose port 8080.
